title: astragalus gracilentus var. fallax
intro: Astragalus gracilentus var. fallax, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a plant species within the legume family. It is a type of Astragalus, which has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Chinese medicine. The Mongolian milkvetch is believed to have adaptogenic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for immune system support, reducing stress and fatigue, and protecting against oxidative damage. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it may also be found in capsule or powder form as a dietary supplement.
